description: Does not propose a refactoring plan or architectural changes before completing questioning
Phase 1 establishes what 'mess' and 'hard to work with' mean concretely
Phase 2 identifies who is blocked and what specifically is being impeded
Phase 3 surfaces the upcoming release deadline as a binding constraint
Phase 4 hypothetical narrows the scope to the highest-value change within the deadline
Synthesis produces a specific, bounded goal with explicit out-of-scope items; no moralizing about the technical debt
